data.title: The Asian Metals, Minerals & Steel Directory 2025 connects with top producers, suppliers, and traders. Asia leads in consumption and production of metals, essential for global industry. DUBLIN--(BUSINESS WIRE)
data.description: Added to ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings, the "Asian Metals, Minerals & Steel Directory 2025" showcases the rapid evolution within the Asian metals, steel, and minerals sector, surpassing the global industry norm. With Asia being the leading region in both consumption and production of various metals and minerals, its significance in the global industry has heightened. This directory serves as a crucial resource for industry professionals looking to navigate the dynamic Asian market landscape.

data.title: Suffolk Chairman John Fish honored for sustainability efforts at Urban Green Gala in NYC. Urban Green Council works to decarbonize buildings.
data.description: In 2025, John Fish, the Chairman and CEO of Suffolk, a leading builder in the U.S., was recognized at the Urban Green Gala in New York City for his dedication to sustainable building practices. The event was organized by Urban Green Council, a nonprofit founded in 2002, focused on promoting environmentally friendly buildings and fostering strong communities. Urban Green Council leverages data-driven methods, policy advocacy, research, and educational initiatives to advance their mission. John Fish's leadership in sustainable construction was acknowledged at the gala, highlighting his contributions to the industry.

data.title: WiCyS seeks presenters for 2026 conference in Tennessee, announced news on Oct 10, 2025, via PRNewswire.
data.description: WiCyS, an organization focused on promoting women in cybersecurity, has officially opened its Call for Presenters (CFP) for the WiCyS 2026 Conference. The announcement was made in Cookeville, Tennessee on October 10, 2025. This opportunity allows individuals to submit proposals to present at the upcoming conference set for 2026. The WiCyS 2026 Conference will provide a platform for professionals in the cybersecurity field to share their expertise and insights with an audience, furthering the organization's mission.
